meaning: n.领导者,经理,指挥管弦乐队、合唱队的,(市内有轨电车或公共汽车)售票员,<美>列车长
examples: The conductor beat time with a baton.
Graphite is a highly efficient conductor of electricity.
Under its new conductor, the orchestra has established an international reputation.
Each concert is different, depending on the interaction between the conductor, the musicians and the crowd.
A., as a "masterful conductor, " her traffic enforcement agents the members of her orchestra.
